holdings.infoBox: SPYV is an equity ETF with a total of 441 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 7.53%, Amazon.com at 3.78%, Exxon Mobil at 2.04%, Intel at 1.97%, and Walmart at 1.79%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Portfolio S&P 500 Value ETF (SPYV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Value index. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap value-style securities from the S&P 500. SPYV was launched on Sep 25, 2000 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: How a 200% YTD Rally Landed Micron Inside This Value ETF
data.text: Indexed ETFs are inherently built to remove human emotion when it comes to portfolio construction. While human beings are certainly fallible by nature, that isn't to say rules-based indexing isn't.
